mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( post_id, user_id, parent_id, comment_content ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentId}, #{commentContent} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM v_post_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY comment_created_at
SELECT * FROM v_user_comment_with_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY comment_created_at DESC
